review_title: Very good tool for save reporting time.
description: I think it's a very good tool for reporting teams, save a lot of time.
author: Jose Luis S.
pros: It's cheaper than others similar tools. The support team is very good (and in speak Spanish if you want.) It has lees limitations on their subscription plans than others. Good relation between price and quality.
cons: Sometime connectors don't work. But in most cases it's a problem with data sources.

review_title: I've been using it for a short time, and I absolutely love it!
description: It has been a great experience. It was very easy to start and set up.
author: Raquel A.
pros: With Dataslayer, I can accomplish things that I couldn't with other connectors, allowing me to create more comprehensive reports in Looker Studio. I’m automating reports in Sheets so employees can have data available at all times, helping us save time on manual work.
cons: I don't have any contra. It has been a great experience.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

author: Charles L.
pros: It is very easy to use and the data sent is accurate and reliable. The setup process is straightforward and quick, making it simple to implement even without deep technical knowledge.
cons: I haven’t encountered any major issues so far. If anything, there could be more advanced customization options or additional documentation for complex use cases, but overall the tool works very well.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

author: Verified Reviewer
pros: They are easy to find on a Google Search and have no problem taking your money without offering any form of support or resolution.
cons: The platform is ineffective and lacks more qualities that other competitors provide. Customer service is severely lacking and they hide behind T&Cs with no care for their customers.

description: Dataslayer and their team has been great! Their support team is quick to answer questions and assist.
author: Brad M.
pros: Dataslayer is easy to use and connect to Looker Studio. This makes it simple to create well designed reports for clients.
cons: There are a few reporting metrics that are missing from Klaviyo (new connection at time of review)
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

description: Amazing service that I am completely happy with.
author: Dan K.
pros: The customer service and ease of use. It is much more reliable then Supermetrics.
cons: The integrations could use additions. They however are doing their best to add what we need.

review_title: Great for avoiding API connectors and just worry about data!
author: Alejandro D.
pros: Dataslayer compared with their competitors is cheaper, and not just that, they offer a great support and have a lot of API connectors.
cons: Sometime ago, they did have a UI which I was not very fan of, but they modernized and changed it! It's great now.

description: easy to use, great support to fix tools.
author: nadia lucia F.
pros: the facility to use and the fast support via email.
cons: the diferences between costs in platforms (like google ads) and dataslayer import (i think for the exchange rate USD-ARS).

description: They are very happy to help us in every need we might have
author: Blanca Ester L.
pros: They have an amazing customer support, communication is so easy and they are always ready to help us to create the queries we aren't able to. In adition they are always happy to learn more about aur needs and to be propposed with new sources to be created.
cons: It is not about Dataslayer bu about the change of KPIs names in the platforms, since they do the reporting more complicated

description: I love dataslayer. For the money, I wouldn't change a thing.
author: Jeremy R.
pros: Dataslayer performs essential functions for managing my digital advertising campaigns.
cons: It can be a little clunkier than the industry-leading tools.

review_title: Dataslayer: Una Herramienta Imprescindible para Mi Trabajo
description: Excelente, es una herramienta indispensable en mi trabajo. Me sirve para obtener información y analizar tendencias.
author: Noelia B.
pros: La rapidez de exportar los datos. La automatización. Las métricas y dimensiones disponibles. Y el soporte técnico.
cons: Que las url de las imágenes de los posteos se venzan.

author: Adi I.
pros: Easy to use Fast Best value for money I search a replacement for supermetrics and it is the best
cons: Nothing it is really have no cons only pros
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

review_title: Herramienta de extracción de datos para todos
author: Raul P.
pros: me parece que es una herramienta sumamente sencilla, he intuitiva y es accesible ya que tiene planes que se ajustan a todos.
cons: creo que deberían tener una guiar donde expliquen que datos se pueden combinar y cuales no en una misma consulta.

description: 100% recommended to work with paid and organic dashboards in Looker. They have a lot of connectors, the price is quite good, and customer support is excellent.
author: Neus P.
pros: The number of connectors. The price. Easy to use, easy to connect and set up connectors and sources. Excellent, brilliant and fast customer support.
cons: Google Ads connector doesn't give me a metric that are in the Google Ads platform, but right now I don't need this metric so i don't miss it.

description: Pretty good. I have been using it for 2 years now
author: Bautista T.
pros: The select all accounts feature! It’s a life saver
cons: When duplicating google sheets it isn’t essy to change account and not breaking the query

author: Ignacio A.
pros: Its very usefull to connect diferent sources and create multiple dashboards for reporting and visualization
cons: the refreshing proceses could be better, also if there are multiples users trying to refresh a google sheets

review_title: Good connector for our marketing campaigns
author: Fernanda F.
pros: - Ease of use, integration with Google Sheets make us centralize everything in a single spreadsheet. - Reduced the time spent generating reports.
cons: - Maybe the pricing could be more affordable for countries that don't have USD as their main currency.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: A must have tool for data visualization
author: Eynar P.
pros: Its solid as a rock, you can rely on getting your data everytime
cons: Can sum up more tools as connectors, its hard to deploy

review_title: Improvement in Data Collection and Linking
author: salvador A.
pros: The ease with which it collects and links data and accounts.
cons: Sometimes the system is slow or doesn't provide the necessary data, but the next day, for example, it works fine again.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: The overall experience of dataslayer is good, I would recommend it to more people who work in my same sector. It helps you a lot in your daily life to see clearer, more structured and visual data.
author: Ana S.
pros: What I like best about Dataslayer is the simplicity and efficiency in the reporting.
cons: What I liked least about dataslayer is that sometimes the connection loading is slow

author: Julián R.
pros: Easy to use and is a really practical way to extract data.
cons: It can be sometimes slow when you need it the most.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Dylan Z.
pros: Extremely straightforward setup, support was given immediately and very helpful and informative. Many sources to choose from and very thorough.
cons: Would love to be able to make multiple schedules per Google Sheet document, currently it is only possible to do one per Google Sheet. A workaround can be easily found by using multiple Google Sheets, but it is slightly less convenient, unless I am missing something.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

description: It helps a lot in the task of generating reports to monitor digital paid media, which are usually frequent reports and you don't have so much time to spend getting the information from Meta Business Manager/Google Ads or downloading files to create graphs or reports.
author: Ivan L.
pros: I really liked the ease of using the tool, it is very intuitive and it is not limited by the number of users but by the API calls. This is quite good, as it allows other people in the agency to have the opportunity to use the tool without having to pay additional costs for new users, which are usually expensive.
cons: You have to really think about what data you want to get to avoid consuming API calls trying to pick the right metrics. However, once you have them, everything flows great.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

review_title: Must have! Dataslayer is a great tool.
description: Great experience, awesome tool. Must have.
author: Alexandre S.
pros: The price and ease of use. I have used Dataslayer before in an old job. Now, using it my company, and it is by far one of the best options in the market.
cons: For my use, I can't see anything that is missing.

author: Jesse K.
pros: Easy to use, affordable and valuable for our company as it saves time from manual reporting.
cons: Maybe adding more video tutorials would be nice.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial
